The '''Terra Sool militia''' was the local military forces of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Terra Sool]]. They operated their own [[Terra Sool militia fighter|fighters]]. When Terra Sool was occupied by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the militia [[Battle of Terra Sool|rose up]] against the Confederacy.<ref name="CWA" />

==Appearances==
*{{CWACite|2|Skywalkers}} {{1st}} {{Flash}}
